invariants: Capability candidates are inactive until accepted.
Private Memory and Skill rows do not leak across users.
Workers require verified versions and confirmation evidence before activation.
Worker policy gates apply to normal execution and confirmation resume.
Frontend visual style remains unchanged unless explicitly requested.
QA hard cleanup is local-only and prefix guarded.
compatBoundary: Preserve V1/W12 behavior, existing chat/file/artifact flows, and the current frontend visual language while adding V2 capability runtime paths.
nonGoals: No marketplace or arbitrary external hook runtime.
No product API hard-delete path for user-owned capability records.
